name: word_association
title: Word Association
description: A game of word association and deduction, adapted for AI agents.

action.description: For Spymasters: a clue string formatted like 'word, 2' or a dict. Number can be 0 (unlimited guesses, 0 related words, 1 min guess) or -1 (unlimited guesses, infinity related words, 1 min guess). For Guessers: the index (0-24) to guess, or -1 to pass.

episodeSteps.description: Maximum number of steps in the episode.

actTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for agent actions.

runTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) of an episode (not necessarily DONE).

board_size.description: Number of spaces on the board (5x5 grid).

starting_team_words.description: Number of cards assigned to the starting team.

second_team_words.description: Number of cards assigned to the second team.

games_per_episode.description: Number of games to play in a single episode.

memory_window_size.description: Maximum number of past games to keep in history. Set to 0 for unlimited.

seed.description: Seed for random board generation. Set to null for random play.

remainingOverageTime.description: Total remaining banked time (seconds) that can be used in excess of per-step actTimeouts -- agent is disqualified with TIMEOUT status when this drops below 0.

words.description: List of 25 words on the board.

roles.description: List of 25 roles for each word ('blue', 'kaggle_yellow', 'neutral', 'assassin'). Masked for Guessers.

revealed.description: List of 25 booleans indicating if a word has been guessed.

current_turn.description: 0: Blue Spymaster, 1: Blue Guesser, 2: Kaggle Yellow Spymaster, 3: Kaggle Yellow Guesser.

guesses_remaining.description: The number of guesses the Guesser has left based on the Spymaster's clue.

clue_number.description: The original number associated with the Spymaster's clue.
